title: Polarization in Spectral Lines
author: M. Landolfi and E. Landi Degl'Innocenti
description: It provides a rigorous quantum-mechanical framework for understanding the generation and transfer of polarized radiation in astrophysical plasmas, covering topics like the Hanle and Zeeman effects, and is essential for analyzing solar magnetic fields.

title: The Physics of Fluids and Plasmas
author: Arnab Rai Choudhuri
description: The book provides a unified introduction to fluid mechanics and plasma physics for astrophysicists, covering both macroscopic (continuum) and microscopic (particle) theories.
